title: The Sacrificial Altar — Part 5
description: The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene centers on Conis, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp. The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Somebody who likes to show off...
